content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Great Vova Wall (Version 2)". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1092/problem/D2
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the array a.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and then find the median. Calculate the total number of operations required to make all elements equal to the median.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
a.sort()
median = a[n // 2]
operations = sum(abs(x - median) for x in a)
print(operations)
